❯ Create 7 stickies around you and connected to you

◐ The user wants me to create 7 sticky notes around my terminal widget and connect them 
  all to me. Let me use the HTTP API to create them and connect them, since I need to 
  create connectors which are HTTP-only anyway.

  Let me figure out good positions. My widget is somewhere on the canvas. I'll place the
  stickies around my viewport center. The viewport center is at (1972, 1650). I should 
  spread the stickies around my terminal widget.

  Let me first check where my widget actually is on the canvas to position the stickies 
  relative to it.
